bio.quote: Bolverkt is a Djúpdvergr (deep-dwelling dwarf-kin) scout stationed near the Steam-Oasis. She is compact, umber-dark of skin, and economical with words. She serves as first contact for any heroes who i

system.description:
Dwarves

Stereotype: Greedy as a dragon, stubborn as a glacier.

Size: 1M; Speed: 5; Resistance: 0

novice.description:
Dwarves

Stereotype: Greedy as a dragon, stubborn as a glacier.

Size: 1M; Speed: 5; Resistance: 0

system.description: You can paint a rune onto your skin (10 min work). Only one active at a time. * *Detection:* Glows near chosen creature/object type (20 sq). * *Light:* Sheds light (10 sq). Toggle as free action. * *Voice:* Rune-echo bond with one willing creature (1 mile; functions as a telepathic bond).

novice.description: You can paint a rune onto your skin (10 min work). Only one active at a time. * *Detection:* Glows near chosen creature/object type (20 sq). * *Light:* Sheds light (10 sq). Toggle as free action. * *Voice:* Rune-echo bond with one willing creature (1 mile; functions as a telepathic bond).

system.description: Reshape unworked stone with song (1 hour ritual).

novice.description: Reshape unworked stone with song (1 hour ritual).

system.description: You gain an Advantage (Second Chance) on Reason or Intuition tests to identify structural weaknesses or history in stone buildings.

novice.description: You gain an Advantage (Second Chance) on Reason or Intuition tests to identify structural weaknesses or history in stone buildings.

system.description:
A bog-iron and peat community built on stilts above hungry ground, with seasonal movement between safe platforms and hard-learned routes.

Language: Myrmål

Environment: Rural; Organization: Communal; Upbringing: Labor

novice.description:

system.description:
Skills: Vigilant, Vigilant, Discreet.

Languages: No additional languages.

Renown: 0; Wealth: 0; Project Points: 100

Perk: *First Blood*. Once per encounter, when you act on an ambush, pursuit, or hunt you identified first, gain an advantage (second chance) on the first related test.

system.description: As a free action, you grab a willing adjacent ally or object of your size or smaller, then vertical push that target up to a number of meters equal to [[lookup 2*@M evaluate=true]]{twice your Might score}. If a creature you push falls as a result of this movement, the effective distance of the fall is reduced by a number of meters equal to [[lookup 2*@M evaluate=true]]{twice your Might score}. When you use this perk, you can’t use it again until you earn 1 or more Milestones.

system.description:
Subtlety is your art, the tip of the blade your brush. You studied at a secret college, specializing in alchemy, illusion, or shadow-magics. Your training and knowledge place you among the elite ranks of assassins, spies, and commandos. But more potent than any weapon or sorcery is your insight into your enemies’ weaknesses.

As a shadow, you possess abilities that deal significant damage, enable you to move swiftly across the battlefield and evade hazards, and allow you to fade from notice even in the midst of the most intense combat encounters. You also possess more skills than any other hero.

novice.description:
Subtlety is your art, the tip of the blade your brush. You studied at a secret college, specializing in alchemy, illusion, or shadow-magics. Your training and knowledge place you among the elite ranks of assassins, spies, and commandos. But more potent than any weapon or sorcery is your insight into your enemies’ weaknesses.

As a shadow, you possess abilities that deal significant damage, enable you to move swiftly across the battlefield and evade hazards, and allow you to fade from notice even in the midst of the most intense combat encounters. You also possess more skills than any other hero.

system.description:
By observing your enemy, you learn how to use their weaknesses against them, building up a Heroic Resource called insight.

Vigilant in Combat

At the start of a combat encounter or some other stressful situation tracked in combat rounds (as determined by the Director), you gain insight equal to your Milestones. At the start of each of your turns during combat, you gain 1d3 insight.

Additionally, the first time each combat round that you deal damage incorporating 1 or more surges, you gain 1 insight.

Whenever you use a heroic ability that makes use of a attribute test, that ability costs 1 fewer insight if you have an advantage (second chance) or double advantage (second chance) on it. If the ability has multiple targets, the cost is reduced even if the ability gains an advantage (second chance) or has a double advantage (second chance) against only one target.

You lose any remaining insight at the end of the encounter.

Vigilant Outside of Combat

Although you can’t gain insight outside of combat, you can use your heroic abilities and effects that cost insight without spending it. Whenever you use an ability or effect outside of combat that costs insight, you can’t use that same ability or effect outside of combat again until you earn 1 or more Milestones or finish a extended rest.

When you use an ability outside of combat that lets you spend unlimited insight on its effect, such as Black Ash Teleport, you can use it as if you had spent an amount of insight equal to your Milestones.

Vigilant Outside of Combat

Although you can’t gain insight outside of combat, you can use your heroic abilities and effects that cost insight without spending it. When you use an ability outside of combat that lets you spend unlimited insight on its effect, such as Black Ash Teleport, you can use it as if you had spent an amount of insight equal to your Milestones.

system.description: Who says lightly armored heroes can’t also be hard to move? You just need to employ some psionics! The Battlemind kit harnesses the power of your mind to make you harder to move—and to make your foes easier to push around.

novice.description: Who says lightly armored heroes can’t also be hard to move? You just need to employ some psionics! The Battlemind kit harnesses the power of your mind to make you harder to move—and to make your foes easier to push around.

system.description:
If you spend 10 minutes or less interacting with a creature who hasn’t met you before, you can cause them to forget your face when you part. If asked to describe you, the creature gives only a vague, blank, and unhelpful description.

Additionally, if you spend 1 hour or more assembling a disguise, you automatically obtain a tier 2 outcome on any test that could make use of the Disguise skill. If you have the Disguise skill, you automatically obtain a tier 3 outcome on the test.

novice.description:

system.description: The College of Caustic Alchemy teaches its students recipes for the acids, bombs, and poisons used in their grim work. Graduates of the college are exceptional assassins. You have the Alchemy skill.

novice.description: The College of Caustic Alchemy teaches its students recipes for the acids, bombs, and poisons used in their grim work. Graduates of the college are exceptional assassins. You have the Alchemy skill.

system.description: You always carry a supply of smoke bombs to use for distractions and easy getaways. You can use the Hide free action even if you are observed and don’t initially have cover or concealment. When you do so, you can shift a number of meters equal to your Agility score. If you end this movement with cover or concealment, you are automatically hidden.

You can use the Hide free action even if you are observed and don’t initially have cover or concealment. When you do so, you can shift a number of meters equal to your Agility score. If you end this movement with cover or concealment, you are automatically hidden.

system.description: You know just where to cut your enemies. Whenever you make a strike that has no disadvantage (second chance) or double disadvantage (second chance), and that incorporates 1 or more surges, you {Gain 1 Additional Surge} that you can use only on that strike.

novice.description: You know just where to cut your enemies. Whenever you make a strike that has no disadvantage (second chance) or double disadvantage (second chance), and that incorporates 1 or more surges, you {Gain 1 Additional Surge} that you can use only on that strike.
